query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.role, u.branchId, b.name as branchName, u.isActive 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN branches b ON u.branchId = b.id 
WHERE u.role IN ('admin', 'branch_admin', 'branch_user') 
ORDER BY u.branchId, u.id;
command:
